meaning: Internet Engineering Task Force,Internet工程任务组
examples: IETF: Vist the Internet Engineering Task Force.
The IETF consensus process manages the schemes.
Originally, the IETF thought ISPs would want to move to IPv6 to meet customer demand for new Internet addresses.
The logjam ended in late June when the IETF leadership voted to make two key IPP-related documents proposed standards.
